title: Product sync — 2026-06-19
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-06-19
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Acme Robotics escalated Real-time Collaboration problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'Granular notification controls' across accounts.
- Eng notes Real-time Collaboration generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'Granular notification controls' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Real-time Collaboration performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Acme Robotics.
